task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet, CSV file, or document containing the chemical reaction data (RXN-001 to RXN-008) is visible on the screen.
A calculator, spreadsheet formula, or code script is visible showing the calculation of (actual/theoretical)*100 for the reactions.
A text editor or terminal shows 'yield_audit.txt' containing RXN-001 and its calculated yield (approx 78.85%) or discrepancy (approx 3.65).
A text editor or terminal shows 'yield_audit.txt' containing RXN-004 and its calculated yield (approx 80.49%) or discrepancy (approx 0.99).
A text editor or terminal shows 'yield_audit.txt' containing RXN-007 and its calculated yield (approx 85.96%) or discrepancy (approx 0.96).
The 'yield_audit.txt' file is saved in the ~/Documents/ directory, indicated by the file path in the editor or a terminal command.

integrity.description: The agent actually performed the calculations using a tool rather than hallucinating the values.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a calculator app, spreadsheet formulas, or a script used to compute the yields.

integrity.description: The agent created and edited the audit file manually or via a custom script.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor is open with the file contents, or terminal commands show the file being written to.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 8 reactions. Three reactions have intentionally incorrect reported yields: RXN-001 (calculated 78.85%, reported 82.5%, discrepancy 3.65 pp), RXN-004 (calculated 80.49%, reported 79.5%, discrepancy 0.99 pp), and RXN-007 (calculated 85.96%, reported 85.0%, discrepancy 0.96 pp). The other 5 reactions have correct reported yields. The agent must identify and record these discrepancies in ~/Documents/yield_audit.txt.
